account.title: Account
account.description: Enter the name of your Snowflake account

database.title: Database
database.description: Specify the database you want to use after creating the connection

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.description: The default virtual warehouse to use for the session after connecting. Used for performing queries, loading data, etc.

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: Enter the schema you want to use after creating the connection

role.title: Role
role.description: Enter the security role you want to use after creating the connection

clientSessionKeepAlive.title: Client Session Keep Alive
clientSessionKeepAlive.description: Whether to keep alive the client session. By default, client connections typically time out approximately 3-4 hours after the most recent query was executed. If the parameter clientSessionKeepAlive is set to true, the client’s connection to the server will be kept alive indefinitely, even if no queries are executed.
